description.value: This value set includes sample Information Category codes.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: Codes conveying additional situation and condition information.
Discharge status and discharge to locations.
Period, start or end dates of aspects of the Condition.
Nature and date of the related event e.g. Last exam, service, X-ray etc.
Insurance policy exceptions.
Materials being forwarded, e.g. Models, molds, images, documents.
Materials attached such as images, documents and resources.
Teeth which are missing for any reason, for example: prior extraction, never developed.
The type of prosthesis and date of supply if a previously supplied prosthesis.
Other information identified by the type.system.
An indication that the patient was hospitalized, the period if known otherwise a Yes/No (boolean).
An indication that the patient was unable to work, the period if known otherwise a Yes/No (boolean).
The external cause of an illness or injury.
The reason for the patient visit.
Patient Medical Record Number associated with the specific claim.
Patient Account Number associated with the specific claim.
Dates corresponding with the admission and discharge of the beneficiary to a facility.
Date the claim was received by the payer.
Code indicating whether or not the prescription is a compound.
Code indicating the prescriber's instruction regarding substitution of generic equivalents or order to dispense the specific prescribed medication.
Value indicating the Number of days supply of medication dispensed by the pharmacy.
Value indicating the number fill of the current dispensed supply (0, 1, 2, etc.)
Value indicating the number of refills authorized by the subscriber (0, 1, 2, etc.)
Code indicating how the prescription was communicated (e.g. transmitted as an electronic prescription, by phone, by fax, or as a written paper copy).
Orthodontics treatment indicator.
Additional physical service site on the patient (limb, tooth, etc.).
Patient weight at time of service.
Reason ambulance transport was needed.
Transportation service distance traveled.
Transportation service reason for round trip.
Purpose of stretcher use.
Transportation service patient pick-up Location.
Transportation service patient drop-off location.
